Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lindon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon is a member of the Wei clan and the family Shi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon's full name is Wei Shi Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon uses a Foundation technique learned as a child to cycle his madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon can activate scripts using his madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon's madra is visualized as a blue-white light moving through his body like veins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon can use scripts to draw in a Remnant so that the spirit's own madra powers the script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon has a numb arm in a sling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon was searching for an ancestral fruit on behalf of his mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon has lightning in his stomach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon has failed the testing bowl seventeen times.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is tasked with feeding Elder Whisper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon can cycle his madra to prevent exhaustion and restore stamina.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon carries a bucket of jade-scaled river carp to feed Elder Whisper twice daily.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon has a broken arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is using a pain-suppressing script left by his mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is digesting a spirit-fruit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon proposed a duel with specific terms: each party takes one strike without defense or resistance, and the first to lose footing is defeated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Shi Lindon is an Unsouled who has shown abilities beyond his level of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon redoubled his training after his broken arm was removed from its sling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon intends to find his own way in the sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon spends his mornings training with Kelsa in the Shi family courtyard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon studies technique manuals in the archive during the afternoons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon cycles in the evenings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is the champion of the Foundation tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon uses the Empty Palm technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is an Unsouled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is a sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is also known as Wei Shi Lindon the Unsouled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon dies at the end of his dream.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's fate included dying in a Dreadgod attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon is referred to by the celestial messenger as Wei Shi Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon is referred to as Wei Shi Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon receives a glass bead token containing a blue candle-flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Wei Shi Lindon is a disciple of the Heaven's Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon is at the Foundation stage of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon possesses pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon won a contest against Kazan Ma Deret by virtue of incapacitation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon is a disciple of the Heaven's Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon possesses a boundary formation of his own consisting of purple banners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon uses a wooden ward key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon carries boundary flags and Suriel's warm marble in his pack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon's clothes are white disciple's clothes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon asks Yerin if she can keep him alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon uses a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's body is not yet at the Iron stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon possesses a halfsilver dagger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon used an ancestral orus fruit to activate the Thousand-Mile Cloud and the White Fox boundary.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses the Heart of Twin Stars cycling technique to split his core into two.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — After splitting his core, Lindon has two dim balls of light inside him like blue-white stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon is an eight-year-old boy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses the Heart of Twin Stars to direct madra into one core while keeping the other closed.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is a character who has an injured back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon has split his core into two parts to follow the Path of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon has two cores.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon's cores are the size of his fist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon's madra is a dim blue-white light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon successfully advanced to the Copper stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is the founder of a Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is advancing to Copper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's name for Lindon is Wei Shi Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon possesses a Copper spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon possesses a parasite ring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is a member of his clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon has a weaker core and another core he can switch to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is traveling on a cloud with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon stood like a statue to avoid showing pleasure at the humiliation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Wei Shi Lindon carries a wooden badge etched with the symbol 'empty'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Wei Shi Lindon has a transparent bead in his pocket made of Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon is a bystander watching the confrontation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon has a madra deficiency.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon possesses pure madra, twin cores, and a broad frame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is a Copper stage practitioner who has never been given a Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's sleeping space was located among the rafters in a pile of hay accessible by a creaking ladder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has been working for Fisher Gesha for almost two weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon's madra is essentially all water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon possesses a red Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is in the process of learning Forging.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon visited Yerin five days after his release from the Sandvipers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon has not yet forged his scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon was sneaking around the Sandviper camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon is a newly adopted Fisher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon is present in the mines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon is a prisoner being forced to use mining equipment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon refers to Eithan as 'elder brother'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon split his core himself as a defensive measure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's madra flow is knotted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon possesses a Path manual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan knows Lindon's full name is Wei Shi Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon held up the marble and began to cycle while running.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon is a Copper stage practitioner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon has split his own core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon is blind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon was bruised and scraped after a fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon has a cracked rib.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's legs are swollen and useless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon has been unable to walk for days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon uses his spare madra to Forge the Sylvan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's fortress is made of Remnant pieces like bright blue shells and shimmering green limbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon uses a spider-construct's claws to cut dead matter away from Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's weapon is a severed Sandviper stinger with a cloth-wrapped hilt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon is at the peak of Copper stage in one core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon has raised his second core to Copper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon Forges scales to advance his core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon is on the verge of advancing to the Iron stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's parents are at the Iron stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon is not yet sixteen years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon pushed the venom everywhere he hadn't already worked his madra, forcing it into his muscles, his skin, even the very center of his bones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's screams during the Iron transformation are deafening.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon has successfully transitioned to Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon shouts for others to wait.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon is an Iron stage practitioner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon is a character.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon has a shattered core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon has a Bloodforged body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon is a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Wei Shi Lindon is a subject of probabilistic calculation regarding his future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — There is a high probability that Wei Shi Lindon will fill one of his cores with the Path of the Stellar Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — There is a high probability that Lindon will die after scoring a severe wound on Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — There is a low probability that Lindon will fail to find a suitable Path for his Path of Twin Stars and be executed by the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon devises a weapon specifically designed to counter Jai Long’s spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon dies of his wounds after a duel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon wears an iron badge around his neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon holds the spear of his ancestor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Eithan questions if Lindon can keep up with his goal.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon is training in Soulsmithing with Gesha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon possesses a spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon is a student of Fisher Gesha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon has an Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon can use the Enforce technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon scripts his camp against Remnants and dreadbeasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is of the Iron stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon brought down the Sandviper heir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon has a Bloodforged Iron body that heals his fatigue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon cycles his madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon carries a warm glass marble in his pocket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon's cores combined add up to a normal Iron sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon has two cores, one Copper and one Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon is practicing a cycling technique that causes him to feel like he is choking and dying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon's Path of Twin Stars breaks one normal-sized core into two smaller cores.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has two half-sized cores filled with Iron-quality pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon uses a short-bladed knife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has a glass ball with a steady blue flame in his pocket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has seen visions of the greatest people on the planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon was raised to believe dragons were myths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon is interested in the Path of the Broken Star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon has encountered Elder Whisper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon can feel Orthos's presence even with his eyes shut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — One of Lindon's cores is a ball of black flames shot through with red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon has been learning to cycle a new Path for three days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon was acclimating to the aura in a side chamber of Underground Chamber Number Three.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon carries a black iron medallion showing a hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon was locked in the Transcendent Ruins by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's spirit has a weight and gravity that no Iron can fake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's core is packed with burning, dangerous madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan directed Lindon to a specific Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has a black-and-red core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is a character who uses the Burning Cloak technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan intends to honor his word once Lindon surrenders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon spoke into the dirt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon uses the Burning Cloak technique during the Enforcer Trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has been training in a damp cave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon can keep the Burning Cloak active for twenty minutes if he is not cut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon uses a cycling technique taught by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon possesses a smoky gray crystal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has a Blackflame core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's Blackflame madra is ready to push him forward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon has cleared the Enforcer Trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon's path is suitable for a heron to kill a lion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon's madra is weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon has a contract with Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Wei Shi Lindon is an Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Wei Shi Lindon is a sword artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon and Yerin knelt before the Ruler Trial’s tablet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon possesses Blackflame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon can take hits from Blackflame madra without dissolving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon has Twin Stars madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon is a character who enters the Ruler Trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Wei Shi Lindon is a Jade stage practitioner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon could feel the pain of venom working through Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's core flared with a dark, bloody light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon cycled to digest power using a simple breathing technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon used a Striker technique that caused him to feel dizzy from the strain on his spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon has a jade badge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon found Eithan at the edge of a cliff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon possesses eyes that resemble a death Remnant, with black surroundings and blood-red rings in the center.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Wei Shi Lindon claims to be on Arelius family business.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon and Yerin left Sacred Valley and entered the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — A young Underlord had found Lindon and Yerin, adopting them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Wei Shi Lindon has deviated from his primary course.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon is currently being held in a room that functions as a prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon possesses a glass ball that burns with a blue flame in the center.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon has enough power to mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Wei Shi Lindon is a tall and broad-shouldered man with short black hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Wei Shi Lindon's eyes are solid black with solid red irises.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is a Lowgold in the Path of Black Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon's Blackflame madra can transform his spirit into a rolling chaos of dark fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon used Blackflame madra to combat the cold wind on a gray mountain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is in a room that is approximately one hundred yards square.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is a Lowgold with a second, weaker core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon possesses a Lowgold pure core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon uses a half-formed Striker technique involving Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon has a pure core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon switched to Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon has a pure core and the Bloodforged Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon's Path is the Path of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon is an unconscious character who emitted a thin stream of pale blue from his form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon's arm was cut at the elbow by Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon has an empty Blackflame core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has lost his right arm above the elbow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon possesses the Path of Black Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon's Paths would be easier to advance if he had the Ancestor's Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon could split his core again to drain a third Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon is concerned about falling behind in his advancement if he stays in bed for months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan has taken a significant interest in Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon's madra was weak following a fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon uses Blackflame and the Burning Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Wei Shi Lindon has a rough face, tall build, and broad shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Wei Shi Lindon may have helped the group out of goodwill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is ranked twenty-fourth among Lowgolds after his duel with Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is sitting side-by-side with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon has a new arm that is being turned into a construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon heard a rumor in the city that the Emperor's Overlord-stage weaponry might have been created in the Soulsmith foundry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has a white arm construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon's arm construct is made of pure white madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is ranked twenty-fourth among Lowgolds on the combat charts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon was a Copper stage practitioner last year.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has black eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is aware that the concept of an Unsouled was a fabrication created by Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon's eyes can transform into a copy of Orthos' eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon was squirming against manacles beside the Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon uses his skeletal Remnant arm to defend himself against metal balls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon is of the Arelius family and the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon lost a duel to Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's ears had just healed enough to hear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon has a Remnant arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's Remnant arm is a skeletal white hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon possesses Sylvan Riverseed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon placed his palm on the bloody surface of the parasite and triggered the binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon uses a technique embedded in his Remnant arm to bind the Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon's madra channels were strained by his use of the Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon uses an Empty Palm technique to thrust pure madra from his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon wields a white sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon uses a sword that has an icy cold property.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's homeland is Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon wants to find a way to catch Eithan in a lie or an evasion.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is a Gold stage practitioner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is a Wei Shi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon stepped through the portal into a bubble of air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon has the Eye of the Deep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon's madra channels were shrieking in protest after he used them to force out dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon wears a Burning Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon has a skeletal Remnant arm made of white madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon's core contains almost nothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon compared the elixir to a full night's sleep in a bottle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon is an apprentice Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon is mentioned by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon is alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon has an inhuman right hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon grabbed an old Remnant body and ran through the trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon has a dying pure core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon's pure core recovers at a snail's pace without help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon can consume madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon can use dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon has trained by cycling the energy of the sacred fish.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon can use the Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon can use the hunger binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon can use Flowing Flame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon wears a gold badge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon's right arm was not obeying him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon observes the blue lights and silver scales near a bubble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon's madra channels were strengthened by the water from the Spirit Well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon is pushing the barriers of Lowgold due to the Spirit Well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon reached Highgold on the Path of Black Flame in two days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon has a Twin Stars manual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon is in the Monarch's pocket world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon advanced to Highgold in his pure core two weeks after reaching the Spirit Well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon uses a void key to store items.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon is a Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon uses the Soul Cloak technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon cycles fire and destruction aura from burning undergrowth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon uses Dream Well water to stay awake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon cycles power from the Life Well to Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon launched a bolt of dragon's fire at Harmony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon possesses Suriel's marble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon possesses a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon is approaching the Truegold stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon is a person Yerin wants to reach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's Goldsign is more dense than before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon can feel the armor draining Harmony's spirit and attention through his spiritual perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon used the Soul Cloak and his reinforced body to climb a cliff.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon was cycling madra to his limb to avoid being lost to the wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon uses dragon's breath in his left palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon's body was enhanced by meat from Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon used a nail to scratch runes into a door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon thought about pulling Dross out of his spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon is wearing a tight-fitting cloth suit beneath his armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon relies almost entirely on Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon has practiced the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel for a year and a half.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon is trying to master two Paths and Soulsmithing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon has found a way to enhance his mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon possesses ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has a Life Well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon's void key contains Harmony's axe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon's supply of Spirit Well water is low.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon has taken Spirit Well water to push his pure core closer to Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon's Blackflame core is described as a dark sun hanging on one side of his spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon has a blue-white core that is an equal to his Blackflame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon reached the end of Truegold and opened his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon is sitting in the Night Wheel Valley forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon was not part of the fighting detected by Yerin's senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The woman asked for Wei Shi Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon has a white prosthetic arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's madra channels were strained by the use of many techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon had been strengthened in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's soulspace is not yet large enough to hold Harmony's axe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon is not yet a Lord but is on the stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon sent pure madra to Dross at the base of his skull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Kiro's shield impact crushed Lindon into the earth and stones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's Remnant arm fingernails are tipped like dull claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon kindled the Burning Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon can gather Blackflame into his hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon uses Harmony's axe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon's lifeline was healthy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon can use unshaped pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has a Remnant replacement for his hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon is an apprentice of Eithan Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon is a Blackflame boy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon was led by Eithan to Fisher Gesha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has a Remnant arm that is jagged and angular.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's Remnant arm is made of white material.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has repaired his Remnant arm with hunger bindings taken from dreadbeasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's Remnant arm is supposed to be lost when he advances to Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's Remnant arm was made together with Fisher Gesha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon uses dream madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's concentration is enhanced by Dross' presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's Remnant arm is losing its luster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon is cut off from the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon is a member of the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon possesses a ball of gray soulfire inside him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon has soulfire in his spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon is on the brink of becoming an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon wore modified Skysworn armor with script lines and a bare white Remnant limb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon noted that the Seishen King's shield reminded him of Kiro's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon can cycle Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon discovered what Dross could do for a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon uses a cannon that can be depleted of its essence and destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin apologizes to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon is holding a launcher construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon is someone Akura Mercy sought to save.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses a void key to pull out an axe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon's axe has a long bone haft and a red gleaming edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon is a Truegold with a white arm that can crack and spray madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon has a Remnant limb that is fractured and barely holding together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon is known as the Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon has Skysworn armor with an emergency wind barrier.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses hunger binding in his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses pure madra to bind Archstone fragments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses ghostwater to assist in mental imaging during forging.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon's Remnant arm is repaired into a pure white human arm via soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon's advancement involves soulfire rebuilding his madra channels and strengthening his bones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses Underlord madra to activate a binding on his axe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon advanced to Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon's right arm is chalk-white and looks like a human's arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon's Skysworn armor is cracked all over.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon underwent a soulfire transformation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon has the spiritual perception of a Lord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon is mentioned in relation to the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon is Kelsa's brother.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon is a person mentioned by Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is sitting in a dungeon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon was brought to Moongrave by the Sage's transportation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is a Wei Shi Lindon Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon rose from the Blackflame territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon practices a pure madra Path and an inherited fire and destruction Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is being introduced to Mercy's peers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon requested mental enhancement elixirs, madra restoration pills, and a parasite ring from an Akura servant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is experiencing quiet panic while Akura Charity examines Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is a guest of Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon has explosive constructs stored in his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon possesses Skysworn armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon is practicing focused technique training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon has a gash in his lip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon lives in Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon uses pure madra to drown spiritual attacks to his core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon is a qualified participant in the Uncrowned tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon was adopted into the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon holds a construct that exploded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is staying in the Ninecloud Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon's breath locked in his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon is a competitor in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's objective is to lead the white army to victory by eliminating all black soldiers or destroying the black base dome.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon passed the third and fourth trials without using any new techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon's ranking moved up to thirty-first.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has revealed his Soul Cloak, dragon's breath, hunger binding, and mind-spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is ranked tenth in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon can store items in his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon arrived and shoved dragon’s breath into a Ghost-Blade's chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has seen lethal attacks cause victims to dissolve into light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon can use Copper sight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon uses the Soul Cloak to move with speed and grace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon adds soulfire to his Empty Palm techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has trained at the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon uses the Archstone to reinforce his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon wears Akura sacred artist's robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon uses Little Blue for help with his core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon has a Remnant hand that can conduct the Empty Palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon uses hunger binding to weaken attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon can gather pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon's head was torn off by Sophara's claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon reappeared on the beach after a battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon can let the Path of Black Flame bleed into his eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon wears a halfsilver badge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon offers to fight the Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon draws on his fire Path to increase heat tolerance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon uses a two-handed dragon's breath attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon had to force his body to move like a puppet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's prize is a heart cast in dark gray metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon has an Iron Heart that has integrated with his Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's Iron body can draw pure madra from him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's shield can take a spiritual form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon was watching Yerin's face closely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses a shield and Wavedancer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon is a rival of Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses soulfire control to weaken sword-aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses a technique from Eithan to blast pure madra from his body as spiritual armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon's pure core was tapped out after his massive madra attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon is described as a madra monster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon can Forge Blackflame madra.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon's madra was affected by a will not his own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon was eliminated from the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon did not see the Dragon King leave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon has a room in the Akura family's amethyst spire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon uses a scripted card to open his room door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon was a Copper at the time of his visit from Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon sensed blood madra within Yerin's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon was sitting cross-legged on his bed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is a companion of Eithan and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon watched the fight from the Akura audience platform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon practices the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon has a Remnant hand with five white fingers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon was watching the Uncrowned matches with Yerin and Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon noticed the Ninecloud Soul skated over the name of his fourth-round opponent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has been training as instructed by Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon expressed interest in joining the Akura operation near the Wandering Titan to find enemies for training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon felt embarrassment for being the only one who had not made it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon can activate a void key to open a closet-sized door in midair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin had a match against Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon summoned the Ninecloud Soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon has two spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon is wearing a blue-white Soul Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon is being prepared for battle against enemy Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon uses a pure madra veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon possesses the Dragon Descends technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon has the Heart of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is working on a new technique called Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon made it the farthest in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon possesses Wavedancer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon carries a construct that can receive messages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon uses a green Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has a blue spirit that perches on his shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has a fever for points.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon works as a Soulsmith when he cannot find a mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon uses Little Blue to treat injuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is in command of the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon is part of a team that forced Truegold cultists away from a tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon told Dross to relay the plan to Pride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon uses a gatestone that looks like a lump of sparkling blue chalk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon uses earth aura and madra to create blades from loose stones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon uses a combination of Ruler and Striker techniques to create physical and spiritual destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon's armor is a functional prototype cobbled together from Skysworn armor and plates scavenged from the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon's prototype armor can activate six full-body Enforcer techniques at once.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon's prototype armor drains his pure core rapidly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon's pure madra empowered by Little Blue interferes with his prototype armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon leaped forward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon did not beat his opponent under tournament conditions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon is interested only in Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon was eliminated from the matches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon was crouched on a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon believed Mercy and Min Shuei could win.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Charity stated that Lindon will no longer have time for his previous activities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon fought Naian Blackflame using dragon's breath from his palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon can give off a domineering and aggressive impression when holding Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin saw herself across the table from Lindon at the Sundown Pavilion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon is in a dangerous situation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon's safety depends on Yerin winning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon rides a black dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon wants permission to drain madra from the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon did not perform any Soulsmithing during his rest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon checked his void key before preparing to leave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon is experiencing a vision that makes his body unresponsive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon is attempting to separate his memories from the Dreadgod's memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon was standing in a circle of onlookers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Ruby was with Lindon for three days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon is a character mentioned in relation to Malice's plans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Ruby believes Lindon would hate her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon is a character who was protected by Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon is observing the battle involving Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon moved to join the gang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon uses spiritual perception to sense his surroundings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon cycled his madra to its limit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon barreled into Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon has trained against Sophara six hundred and forty-four times.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Yerin wished she could have met Lindon’s heavenly messenger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon's eyes looked like deep blue gems while maintaining the pure madra field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon has a white hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon's Enforcer technique is stronger than Sophara's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon used a Forged palm of pure madra to wipe out Sophara's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon's eyes transformed into blue crystal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon stated, "I am the end."}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — A black hole swallowed the sky directly over Lindon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon was on the cloudship dock with Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon wore a wintersteel badge with his old Unsouled symbol on it.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon shares a cloud fortress with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is accompanied by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is one of the stars of the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon can drain souls by tightening his grip with his Remnant hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon's perception is better-trained than the average Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon can sense things Yerin cannot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon activated a script-circle to lift protections.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon can feel distortions in space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon felt responsible for the lost lives of the Akura Golds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon has a fortress that uses security circles to disperse hostile madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon is a character who prefers to keep a low profile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon has a personal cloud fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon landed on a snowy mountainside near Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon has a wintersteel badge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon is present in the scene.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon did not use the Burning Cloak to close the distance between him and others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon asked about the Wei clan exiles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon absorbed a Striker technique into his hunger arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has a pale right hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has red-and-black eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon wears robes of black, white, and purple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon wears a shadesilk ribbon with a badge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon's badge has the Unsouled symbol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon gripped the Enforcer by the neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon is taller than Kelsa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon is Gold stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon is a Lord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon is a realm beyond Gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon has eyes made of blue crystal with white circles for irises.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon possesses the spiritual strength of a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon is currently at Lowgold level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon has a Riverseed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon can use his authority to move objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Using his authority causes Lindon to feel mentally drained.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon attempted to use his authority to change the shape of a mug.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon's attempt to change the mug's shape resulted in an identical mug.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon cannot re-open a portal with his madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon can use his authority to fill a cup with water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon is performing Soulsmithing operations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon has mighty friends that Heaven’s Glory respects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon watches the evacuation from a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has the authority of the Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon can use the Consume technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon can use the Forger technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon can use the Fox Mirror technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has White Fox madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is a swordsman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin tells someone to grab Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon used the Empty Palm technique on the Third Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon uses the Hollow Domain technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon has a fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon uses madra to open his fortress door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon activated a viewing construct to see the scene behind him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's madra can become disordered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon can flow pure madra through himself to change his eyes to blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon had a childhood home that was destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon stopped the cloud's propulsion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon's spirit screamed a warning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon manifested an Icon and brushed against the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's future self has one white arm and one arm coated in black scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's future self has eyes that are black pools with white circles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's future self is able to forge a weapon with the power of a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon advances to the Overlord stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon returned functional constructs to his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon is perceived as a Sage of Twin Stars by Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon rose on his cloud near the halo of light around Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon caught Yerin's arm and pulled her onto his cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's vision blanked out as madra streamed from Yerin and Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon used his Soul Cloak to stay standing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon opened his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon needs to hit the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon is straining his madra channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses the Consume technique to drain energy from the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon was suffering aftereffects from consuming too much of the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon's arm was strained and cracked from absorbing the Titan’s power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon has absorbed appetites from the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Elder Whisper addressed Lindon as Wei Shi Lindon.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is attempting to repair Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon marched into the half-destroyed Tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon found an alliance of five factions around the emergence of the Transcendent Ruins a few years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon emits blue-white pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon can command the Book to release Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon wants to study Mercy's Book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon has an unhealthy obsession with advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon's eyes change color often.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon sensed the cloudships coming before he saw them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon can see the Emperor's cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon reached Sage at the Overlord stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon summoned an Icon when he was an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon is a Sage and an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon's Icon is the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon taught a spiritual Enforcer technique called the Heart of Twin Stars to students.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon's right arm was stitched together with hunger madra from dreadbeast cores.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon addressed Eithan as Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon seeks warmth from Suriel's marble for comfort.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon is considered inexperienced in recognizing certain workings of authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan's madra flooded into Lindon's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon was brought to the second floor of his house on Windfall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Wei Shi Lindon was adopted into the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon was responsible for Dross's evolution in the Ghostwater facility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon believes there may be someone else in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon is a twenty-year-old Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has Soulsmithing tools.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has goldsteel-plated tongs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has a knife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon uses spiritual perception to trace madra systems.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon expected more illusions or clouds but was met with razor-sharp blades or focused beams of heat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon's stomach dropped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon carries enough supplies to act as a refiner and a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon is waiting outside a chamber where deadly blades are raging.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon can sense that an object is a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon can run his madra through a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has a Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has three compatible madra types that can be used to take apart the techniques of others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's pure madra is better at taking apart spiritual energy than destruction madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon uses black dragon's breath and soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Wei Shi Lindon is a person Suriel knows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon straps three launcher constructs to his left arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon is enhanced by the Soul Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon used a healing construct on Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon's pure core had less than a third remaining.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon's soulfire was described as a dim candle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon switched to his Blackflame core when surrounded by water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon controlled finger-thin beams of dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon can leverage his Void authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon used a Hollow Spear to strike Reigan Shen through the gut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon can affect portals made from the Path of the King’s Key with his authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon is low on madra and soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon is down an arm and his pure core is mostly empty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon experiences hunger aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon has been sensing something in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon once dreamed about fighting side-by-side with other sacred artists as an equal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's right hand was limp and broken.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon is slumped against a panel and looks like he is about to collapse in shame and depression.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon can sense the interaction of dream and hunger aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon advised Jai Long to follow his fear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon reached for the case containing Subject One’s hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon reached a consensus regarding the hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon uses a bag for his Soulsmithing supplies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon and Dross were analyzing the underlying technique of the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon was remade by the Pure Storm Baptism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon can focus his authority on the Dreadgod's hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon possesses the Dawn Sky Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon is using the spear Midnight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon is a character who might be able to feel alarm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon intends to tell a story.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon plans to take an arm as an upgrade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon salutes the Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon can read Reigan Shen's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon has strained the connection to Tiberian Arelius' space past breaking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon swears an oath to Reigan Shen for his safety and freedom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon uses soulfire within his Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon has a dead arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon used the Soul Cloak to survive an axe attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon uses a shield summoned from his void key to block lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon uses the Empty Palm technique to meet acidic liquid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon uses bombs, which are explosive single-use constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon's hunger arm crumbles completely due to a new level of energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon is the apprentice of one of Ozmanthus' last descendants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon has the blessing of the Slumbering Wraith's echo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon's Void Icon resonates with the power of hunger in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon gave his word to Subject One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon is in a labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon possesses a white-gray right arm that is more physical than ever.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon can sense the script that controls the surrounding lands of Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon swore an oath not to reveal that Monarchs prevent the Dreadgods from ascending.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon expected to be able to write a letter or give a dream tablet but found his oath was ironclad.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon was frozen in terror.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon has a sealed right arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon possesses an Abidan beacon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon has a Dreadgod arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon attempted to Consume Eithan's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon has a hungry arm.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Ozriel bears a resemblance to Wei Shi Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon's right arm is capable of feeding on sensed power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon uses a black strip of cloth to suppress his Remnant arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon's madra is pure, tinged with Subject One’s hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon has an iron will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is expected to be in Everwood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon has the hand of Subject One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is not ascending yet because the Dreadgods are still here.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is creating constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is in a conversation with Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan Shen examined Lindon and found no immediate danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon uses life and blood constructs to stimulate healing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon stopped Dross from explaining an image.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon can absorb advancement like he is able to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon has a scripted band of cloth around his upper arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon squared his madra and focused his will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon and Yerin are allies to Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon wears an outer robe of the Twin Star Sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon can Consume the power of a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon has advanced to the rank of Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon taught Yerin how to use a basic language construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon experiences vivid nightmares since the rise of Dross' current personality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon discovered the truth about Dreadgods and Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has absorbed the Diamond Veins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is a dead weight that Charity carried to Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon weighs two and a half times as much as Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon violated his oath to Malice by revealing the connection between Monarchs and Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon's will might be compromised due to mental trauma.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is a hulking young man with a white arm that disturbs spiritual senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon's body and spirit were recently wracked with pain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is bound by an oath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon is a point of comparison for Little Blue's strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon's hunger arm is held back by scripted cloth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon has authority over manipulating empty spaces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon realized the Silent King's attack was not limited to Moongrave alone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon is the only student Kelsa has ever trained.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon's Soulsmithing is considered amazing by Kelsa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon used his Hollow Domain to catch himself on his Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's muscles are suffused with life and blood essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon presented Yerin with a fully balanced set of treasures sealed in a package.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon left protections for Kelsa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon gave instructions to sleep inside scripted walls and activate a particular device if besieged.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's mind-spirit was designed by Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon erupts in a globe of pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon possesses white hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon is fighting against the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's spirit is enhanced because he stole energy from the Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon is a young Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon has a connection to the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Dreadgod assaulted Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon consumed the Silent King and stole back his own memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon stole the dream essence that had been missing from his mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's arm was hungry and burning with greed during the consumption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's spirit reached its limit while swallowing the Silent King's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon gathered his remaining power into dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's madra channels burned into his flesh during the power explosion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's cores condensed like a spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's eyes blazed and froze as if channeling Blackflame and pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon is a boy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon prepared emergency measures for Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon has two white Broken Crowns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon arrived behind Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon has white circles in his eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon shot Blackflame through the Dreadgod's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon is not skilled enough to create a portal from Serpent’s Grave all the way to Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon has a chalk-white palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon can fly on an aura of wind and force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon provided a void key to Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon believes that reaching the peak of Archlord brings one close to Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon possesses the script of the Rune Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon possesses the Remnant of the Blood Sage.}}
