* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon can use the Void Icon to hide himself and others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Wei Shi Lindon's power can overcome temporary aura circles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon felt pride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon is using a hammer to shape his will in the Soulforge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon possesses the physical strength of a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon uses a full-body Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon uses a flying sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon uses an open void key to summon constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon uses the Hollow Domain to weaken shadow blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon's temper can cause the Burning Cloak to burst involuntarily.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon can release a dragon's breath empowered by the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon possesses a cleansing tide of pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon picked Mercy up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon flew Windfall north toward the Trackless Sea.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon possesses a repurposed pocket world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon uses the Void Icon to check spatial stability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon uses wind aura to move Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon uses the Soulforge to create a gateway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon uses a signet ring belonging to Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon uses a scepter belonging to an ancient Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon uses a robe that belonged to Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon uses Suriel’s marble to guide his restorative aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon wears a crown that is the legacy of an ancient Monarch found in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon can easily fix physical damage to a scepter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon can use complex Ruler techniques effortlessly without a compatible Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is preparing to embed illusion constructs into the floor of the chambers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon finished the construction of Ghostwind Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon can Consume Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is attempting to prevent Orthos from sensing his frustration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan Shen wants Lindon and Yerin Arelius gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon stole the core to a pocket world from Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — The binding burns against Lindon's eyes and spiritual senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon uses goldsteel tongs to grip the binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon possesses a main void key around his neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon can adjust the flow of time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon uses the Bow of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon has a connection to the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon can forge an arrow using the binding at the heart of his bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon uses a Forger technique to release ten thousand identical arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon can move himself to the location of an arrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon recorded the Paths of Heaven from the bottom of the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has burning, inhuman eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has black-and-white Dreadgod eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has a scale that can dissolve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has consumed things that could have destroyed his soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon's right arm is twitching.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon is using a notebook and quill pen to take notes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon hovered over Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The weight of the dragon's charge reminded Lindon of a physical blow from a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon prepared a diet for Orthos and Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon has the black dragon Remnants locked away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon possesses the power of the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is trading techniques with Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is currently locked in battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon stretched his perception far to the north.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon was concentrating madra in his left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon is using Northstrider's Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon's body was ravaged and his will strained after besting Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is fighting a battle against Monarchs outside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has something to help keep Orthos's memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is a person Mercy wishes was with her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon emerged from the Trackless Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin wants to be sent to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon was weak and potentially dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Little Blue was not strong enough to help Lindon yet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon can push through advancement realms with sheer stubbornness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon sent Ziel and Yerin to the battlefield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon is struggling to stay awake due to the thunder of battle and searing spiritual pain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon staggered through the Nethergate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon's body is halfway between a Herald’s and a Dreadgod’s, most comparable to a Monarch’s.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon's blood essence provides physical strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon can read the feelings of others from their spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon is concerned about the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon is fighting the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon clashed against the Weeping Dragon with Orthos and Little Blue behind him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon met a claw large enough to scoop out villages with black dragon’s breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon gripped a handful of scales and began to Consume.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's madra channels run through his physical body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's cores were deep but not endless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon weakened the Dreadgod’s blow with an Empty Palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon struck the Weeping Dragon across the belly with dragon’s breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon is the Soulsmith who assembled the Penance arrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon dropped his bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon experienced a complete loss of power and aura control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon fell from the sky after losing his power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon appeared as a dense core of black-and-white power beneath the dragon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon forced the Weeping Dragon's breath up into the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's power flickered out like a vanishing candle-flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon gave Ziel, Mercy, and Yerin a chance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon's cores were completely empty and his presence felt weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon crafted the Silent King Bow and its arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon used prototype Penance arrowheads to create three arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon is needed to repair the Grand Oath Array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon was on the verge of death during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — After consuming one Dreadgod, Lindon became powerful enough to defend his labyrinth against multiple Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon's right arm is made of white flesh that is pushing into his chest and being transformed by a Dreadgod's flesh and blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon consumed something from the Dreadgod's corpse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon considered how to use Soulsmithing to remove damage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon summoned Wavedancer from his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Ozriel hoped to see Lindon ascend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon restored the house through a working of the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon has taken more Dreadgod power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider views Lindon as a threat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider refers to Lindon as Ghost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon was looking for Emriss Silentborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon's eyes are black-and-white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon has more authority over hunger than anyone due to the Path of the Hungry Deep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon carries Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon prepared to fight Northstrider by performing a summoning in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon intended to Consume the Monarch upon his arrival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon has already Consumed the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon's hand contains the arm of the Slumbering Wraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon is willing to use force against Northstrider if persuasion fails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon's worst-case scenario is having to kill the Monarch himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon is the current owner of his world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon is referred to as the Empty Ghost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon attempts to enter the Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon's body is a projection of his mind and spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon's power is mostly stolen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon is surrounded by enough power to shake the fabric of the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon never figured out how to fully repair the Array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon's shadow looms in the futures Malice sees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon has reached the level of Monarch in less than a decade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon is fighting two Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon is consuming energy from a meteor condensed from earth aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon uses Wavedancer to deflect a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon used a Soul Cloak-powered punch to meet Reigan Shen's pounce.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon took up most of the Monarch's attention in previous fights with Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon felt Yerin advance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon would have to fight while watching out for Yerin if she joined the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Lindon can steal people's memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Lindon consumed a spear from the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Lindon is in a battle that involves the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Lindon launched dragon's breath at the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Lindon harassed the Titan with Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Lindon commands the working around the Phoenix's talon to break.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Lindon is waiting for something and asks how long he must wait.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Lindon felt like absence and chaos due to his connection to the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Lindon has too much of a connection to hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Lindon is currently in Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Lindon can release a trickle of his spiritual sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Lindon is the Sage of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Lindon can control wind aura over a courtyard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Lindon's time is limited.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Lindon constructed a meeting-space using the authority of the Void Icon and pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Lindon pulls weapons out of his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 34''' — Lindon opened the Soulforge in the depths of the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 34''' — Lindon is using the weapon Genesis.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The Wei Grand Elder's name is Wei Shi Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Wei Shi Lindon is a character who can unleash power that solidifies the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Lindon proposed a game in the arena where hits are worth points.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Lindon's right hand can punch through Markuth's defenses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Lindon uses storm madra to blast against Markuth's attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Lindon summoned a flying sword from his soulspace that shines with blue-gold lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Lindon has nine swords in formation behind him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Lindon is covered in armor made from the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Lindon has a cloak made of boiling liquid blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Lindon's right hand fingers twitched as if possessed by different spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Lindon can grab the Way and tear open a rift.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Lindon is ascending.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Lindon marched into the tenuous portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Lindon ascended from Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Lindon asks if they are heading to Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Lindon's heart lifted when asking about Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Lindon has been away from Yerin and the others for almost two years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Lindon possesses a pair of Icons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Lindon used his spiritual perception to measure the Grave.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is in the labyrinth with Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is referred to as Subject One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is draining a Remnant dry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon is expected to join Mercy and Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon worked with Dreadgod pieces to make a bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon is someone whom Fury has befriended.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon is mentioned as someone who would have looked for a way to kill the Fiend and protect people simultaneously.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has been in the Grave for two days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Wei Shi Lindon is from Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon's spiritual sense and madra are in perfect working condition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has Blackflame boiling in his spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon is fighting enemy forces on Threshold while protecting Northgate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon switched to his pure core and released the Hollow Domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper identifies himself as Wei Shi Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Wei Shi Lindon falls to earth while Dross screams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon's body has been remade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon uses the Void Icon to drive off thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon is a representative of the newly formed Reaper Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon is a Wei Shi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa is the older sister of Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon prepared emergency protections for Kelsa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon made weapons for Kelsa before he ascended.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon's pure madra exploded over the clearing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon offered to take Pride beyond the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon has a connection to Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has set to upgrading the Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon helped Eithan remodel the interior of the Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is interested in finding the source of OTEP's information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon joined his vision with Yerin's to hammer the new fragment into place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon attempted to create a sea within the newborn world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon envisioned Ghostwater and vibrant ocean ecosystems when attempting to create the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon and Yerin emerged from a Way-portal with Abidan warnings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon can push himself through space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon used wind aura to block sound around him and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon extended his spiritual sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon possesses Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon uses Blackflame to burn a man's beard.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
